title: Personalised Baby Blanket Embroidered with Name & Elephant Design Soft Customised Blanket for Newborn Baby Girl Cot & Pram Blanket Baby Girl Present 100x75cm (Pink)
features: 🐘 How to Order - Choose your colour and click on Customise now. Choose between Name Only or Name and Elephant, Enter the personalisation in the box. Add to basket.
🐘 Available in Five Beautiful Colours: pink, blue, grey, coffee or white. The Lobeko Personalised Baby Blanket is made from soft fabric that will ensure the comfort of your new baby.
🐘 Unique personalised gifts: This Lobeko Baby Blanket can be embroidered with your chosen name and includes a beautiful elephant design to make a truly special and exclusive gift for a newborn baby.
🐘 Versatile & durable: Ideal for cot or pram use, this baby blanket is designed to last, making it perfect as a keepsake item for years to come.

🐘 Perfect size: Measuring 100x75cm, this pink Lobeko Baby Blanket offers plenty of snuggly room for newborns without taking up too much space in the nursery! Ideal for general baby use or lovely as a gift for any new addition.
🐘 Adaptable & adjustable: This personalised baby blanket can be washed at a gentle temperature so that you can keep it looking its best after every single use.

🐘 Delightfully unique gift wrapping option included: Receive your Lobeko Personalised Baby Blanket in an elegant box with delightful gift wrapping options available - perfect as a unique and precious Newborn Baby Gift!
description: Product Description Personalised Baby Blanket Name and Elephant Design Our personalised baby blankets come with a choice of name only or elephant and name. Available in 5 beautiful soft colours - Pink, Blue, White, Grey or Coffee. Name only Design All personalisation is embroidered and up to 15 characters allowed. Please note the more characters, the smaller the text will be. Baby Blanket with Name Coffee Baby Blanket White Baby Blanket Grey Baby Blanket Blue Baby Blanket Size Our baby blankets are 75cm x 100cm. Perfect for going out in the pram or wrapping up warm in the car seat. Keepsake Perfect gift for a newborn baby girl or boy, baby shower present or to welcome your little one into the world. Colours Choice of 5 colours to compliment any nursery - Pink, Blue, Grey, White or Coffee. Personalisation All personalisation is embroidered to ensure wash afer wash it is still like new. Can i machine wash? Yes, our baby blankets can be washed at 30 degrees in a washing machine. What is the material? The baby blanket is made from 100% polyester making them soft and gentle on baby skin. What is the size of the blanket? Our blankets are 75cm x 100cm making them perfect for wrapping your little one up when out and about. Can i add a date to the personalisation? Yes you can but please be aware that the more characters, the smaller the text will be.
